bio.content: Dan Liquid and Dan Nu:Tone are collectively known as Danism. Together they form a production team that is synonymous with a high a quality and diverse production sound. With extensive studio experience, Dan Liquid as one half of Liquid People and Dan Nu:Tone as one of the most respected stars on the D&B scene, the pair are currently making serious waves. From their collaboration with Lisa Millet on the ultra soulful ‘One Life’, to the darker dimensions of releases such as the ‘Afterdark’ EP and the ‘Astarte’ EP, Danism’s prolific and versatile output for MN2S has received major support from the likes of Laurent Garnier, CJ Mackintosh, The Shapeshifters and The Jinks. Other Danism releases on MN2S ‘Glance, Look, Stare’ and ‘Truth Is’ which feature vocals from Monique Bingham and Xavier respectively. Their latest essential release (‘Mesmirise’) is their first collaboration with Malaysian vocalist Haze. Featuring a rolling electronic groove, old-school synths and tight, punchy production that all emphasis killer vocal hook, ‘Mesmirise’ has been a major club and hit the top of the specialist download charts. In addition to their output for MN2S, Danism have released material on labels such as Defected, Slip & Slide, and Tony Records. They have additionally commissioned remixes for the likes of Blaze, Soul Central and the Groove Junkies while also working on forthcoming Danism material with Jocelyn Brown, Kenny Bobien and Kathy Brown. Whilst also fulfilling individual DJ commitments, Danism maintain an international DJ schedule that has recently included journeys to destinations across Europe and the U.K. Their contrasting styles and influence fully complement each other behinds the decks. Danism are a production and DJ duo that demand your maximum attention. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
